title: microseris aphantocarpha var. elegans
intro: Microseris aphantocarpha var. elegans, also known as the Elegant Pygmy-daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the western United States. The Elegant Pygmy-daisy has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Microseris aphantocarpha var. elegans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
